title: Historic Entry Door Restoration
subtitle: Weld Mansion — Adams Arboretum Condominiums
description: 990 Centre Street, Jamaica Plain is the historic Weld Mansion — a landmark Victorian estate built around 1885 and converted into residential condominiums. The property sits on landscaped grounds directly adjacent to the Arnold Arboretum, one of the world's great botanical collections. The buildings retain much of their original architectural character, including the ornate carved hardwood entry doors that are among the most distinctive features of the estate.

Boston Door Company was engaged to restore five sets of entry doors across the two main buildings at 990 and 1000 Centre Street — exterior and interior sets at both addresses, plus a second exterior set serving unit #3 at 990. All doors are original period hardwood, heavily carved in the Victorian manner, with arched glass panels and matching period hardware. Decades of deferred maintenance had left the finishes oxidized, checked, and in places completely failed.

The full scope covered complete abatement of existing finishes, wood damage repair, and 3–5 coats of Epifanes natural oil varnish on all exterior faces. Interior faces were cleaned, prepped, and topcoated throughout. Surrounding woodwork at both 1000 Centre sets was included. All hardware was disassembled, serviced, and reinstalled; a broken hinge at the main 990 entry was repaired and matched to the original. The restored doors now reflect the architectural quality of the Weld Mansion as built.

doors.label: 990 Centre St — Exterior Entry
doors.description: The main exterior double doors at 990 Centre Street — the most architecturally significant set on the property. Ornate carved hardwood with arched glass panels and original Victorian hardware. Finish had failed across most of the surface with visible weathering and checking in the wood. A broken hinge required repair and matching before reinstallation.
work: Complete abatement of existing exterior finish
Visible wood damage repaired
Exterior prepped and finished with Epifanes natural oil varnish — 3–5 coats
Interior face cleaned, prepped, and topcoated with natural oil varnish
Broken hinge repaired and matched to original
All hardware disassembled, maintained, and reinstalled
Doors reinstalled and full function verified

doors.label: 990 Centre St #3 — Exterior Entry
doors.description: The exterior entry doors serving unit #3 at 990 Centre Street — a second double door set on the same building, simpler in profile than the main entry but sharing the same period hardwood construction and arched glass detailing. Finish failure was similar in character to the main entry. Hardware was serviced in place; replacement was assessed and not required.
work: Complete abatement of existing exterior finish
Visible wood damage repaired
Exterior prepped and finished with Epifanes natural oil varnish — 3–5 coats
Interior face cleaned, prepped, and topcoated with natural oil varnish
Hardware disassembled, maintained, and reinstalled
Hardware replacement assessed — not required
Doors reinstalled and full function verified

doors.label: 990 Centre St #3 — Interior Entry
doors.description: The interior door set at unit #3, 990 Centre Street. Restored to the same standard as the exterior set, with surrounding woodwork cleaned and refinished as part of the scope. The full entryway — doors, interior face, and surrounding millwork — was brought into a consistent natural oil finish, completing the restoration from street to interior.
work: Complete abatement of existing finish
Visible wood damage repaired
Exterior face finished with Epifanes natural oil varnish — 3–5 coats
Interior face cleaned, prepped, and topcoated with natural oil varnish
Surrounding woodwork cleaned and refinished
Hardware disassembled, maintained, and reinstalled
Hardware replacement assessed — not required
Doors reinstalled and full function verified

doors.label: 1000 Centre St — Exterior Entry
doors.description: The main exterior entry doors at 1000 Centre Street, the adjacent building on the Weld Mansion estate. A different architectural character from 990 — a brick arch surround frames the double door set, giving the entry a more formal presence. Restoration scope matched the 990 exterior sets, with the surrounding woodwork refinished as an additional line item to complete the entryway.
work: Complete abatement of existing exterior finish
Visible wood damage repaired
Exterior prepped and finished with Epifanes natural oil varnish — 3–5 coats
Interior face cleaned, prepped, and topcoated with natural oil varnish
Surrounding woodwork refinished — cleaned, prepped, and topcoated
Hardware disassembled, maintained, and reinstalled
Hardware replacement assessed — not required
Doors reinstalled and full function verified

doors.label: 1000 Centre St — Interior Entry
doors.description: The interior door set at 1000 Centre Street, completing the full restoration of both buildings on the estate. Refinished to the same standard as the exterior set, with surrounding woodwork included. The entire entryway at 1000 — exterior face, interior face, and millwork surround — now reads as a unified natural oil finish, consistent with the restored doors at 990 across the grounds.
work: Complete abatement of existing finish
Visible wood damage repaired
Finished with Epifanes natural oil varnish
Interior face cleaned, prepped, and topcoated with natural oil varnish
Surrounding woodwork refinished — cleaned, prepped, and topcoated
Hardware disassembled, maintained, and reinstalled
Hardware replacement assessed — not required
Doors reinstalled and full function verified
